name: Elliott Vance
bio: London born and trained. Cut his teeth in a Soho shop, then ran the chair at a Marylebone barber for six years before opening Oakline on Cranley Mews in 2016. Fifteen years behind the chair, specialises in skin fades and classic scissor work.

name: Reuben Okafor
bio: Eight years cutting, the last four at Oakline. Beard work is where he shines: textured shapes, sharp line-ups, and hot-oil finishes that hold their shape for weeks.

name: Cal Brennan
bio: Five years in. Trained in Manchester, moved to London in 2023. Texture is his thing: curls, coils, and thick hair that other barbers thin out instead of shaping.
